title: corydalis ecristata subsp. longicalcarata
intro: Corydalis ecristata subsp. longicalcarata, a subspecies of the Corydalis plant, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region and is also known as Himalayan Corydalis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as yunnanenine and dehydrocorybulbine. The health benefits of Corydalis ecristata subsp. longicalcarata include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as arthritis and anxiety. In herbal preparations, Corydalis ecristata subsp. longicalcarata is often used as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is also combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
